title: Macroclinidium × suzukii

The Macroclinidium genus belongs to the family Matoniaceae, a family of ancient ferns. This family is part of the class Polypodiopsida, a group of ferns that are vascular plants. The classification of Macroclinidium × suzukii places it within the division Tracheophyta, which includes all vascular plants. Macroclinidium × suzukii's classification provides insight into the evolutionary relationships of ancient ferns.
